name: World War I
description: Challenge your knowledge about the Great War.

questions.question: What event is widely considered the immediate trigger for WWI?
options: The signing of the Treaty of Versailles
The assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand
The German invasion of neutral Belgium
The sinking of the British ship Lusitania

questions.question: In which year did World War I officially begin?
Which of these nations was NOT part of the Triple Entente?
What was the dominant style of warfare on the Western Front?
What was the name of the German plan to avoid a two-front war?
Which country exited the war in 1917 following an internal revolution?
What new technology was first used in combat during World War I?
What was 'No Man's Land' during the conflict?
options: The territory between opposing trench lines
The neutral sea zones near the Americas
The underground tunnels used for storage
The medical camps behind the front lines

questions.question: In what year did the United States officially enter the war?
Which treaty officially ended the war between Germany and the Allies?
